growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: edwards.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h computed as ln(2)/doubling_time_h. Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: kremer.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h computed as ln(2)/doubling_time_h. Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: 5% N-free BG-11 + vitamin B12, low-N treatment

up.method: 322 ug/L over 9 days (nitrate-N pool exhausted by day 9)

growth_records.cite: Wang et al. Dynamic Phycobilin Pigment Variations in Diazotrophic and Non-diazotrophic Cyanobacteria Batch Cultures Under Different Initial Nitrogen Concentrations. Frontiers in Microbiology (2022). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2022.850997. [PMC9201475]
growth_records.snippet: Dolichospermum flos-aquae strain 1444... The D. flos-aquae populations reached maximum biomass of 6.0 x 10^9 cells/L in 322 ug/L initial N... the nitrate-N pool was not exhausted for D. flos-aquae until Day 9.
growth_records.notes: Diazotrophic (N2-fixing) cyanobacterium. Initial cell density 1.0e9 cells/L (differs from Microcystis). mu=ln(6.0e9/1.0e9)/13=ln(6)/13=0.1378/day=0.00574/h; td=ln2/0.1378=5.03 day=121 h. NO3-N uptake 322/9=35.8 ug N/L/day; SRP (357-60)/14=21.2 ug P/L/day. Diazotroph can also fix N2 (unmeasured). Volumetric only.

growth_records.medium: 5% N-free BG-11 + vitamin B12, intermediate-N treatment

up.method: 2576 ug/L over 12 days (not consumed until day 12)

growth_records.cite: Wang et al. Dynamic Phycobilin Pigment Variations in Diazotrophic and Non-diazotrophic Cyanobacteria Batch Cultures Under Different Initial Nitrogen Concentrations. Frontiers in Microbiology (2022). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2022.850997. [PMC9201475]
growth_records.snippet: 2.6 x 10^10 cells/L in 2,576 ug/L initial N... D. flos-aquae did not completely consume nitrate-N pool until Day 12... SRP concentrations decreased to ... 7 ug/L on Day 14 for D. flos-aquae.
growth_records.notes: mu=ln(2.6e10/1.0e9)/13=ln(26)/13=0.2506/day=0.01044/h; td=ln2/0.2506=2.77 day=66.4 h. NO3-N uptake 2576/12=214.7 ug N/L/day; SRP (357-7)/14=25.0 ug P/L/day. Diazotroph. Volumetric only.

growth_records.medium: 5% N-free BG-11 + vitamin B12, high-N treatment
growth_records.cite: Wang et al. Dynamic Phycobilin Pigment Variations in Diazotrophic and Non-diazotrophic Cyanobacteria Batch Cultures Under Different Initial Nitrogen Concentrations. Frontiers in Microbiology (2022). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2022.850997. [PMC9201475]
growth_records.snippet: 5.5 x 10^10 cells/L in 16,128 ug/L initial N... Nitrate-N concentration only fell to ~6,000 ug/L for M. aeruginosa and 9,700 ug/L for D. flos-aquae... SRP concentration was ~7 ug/L on Day 14 for D. flos-aquae cultures.
growth_records.notes: mu=ln(5.5e10/1.0e9)/13=ln(55)/13=0.3083/day=0.01284/h; td=ln2/0.3083=2.25 day=54 h. Nitrate not exhausted (fell to ~9700 ug/L). NO3-N uptake (16128-9700)/14=459.1 ug N/L/day; SRP (357-7)/14=25.0 ug P/L/day. Diazotroph, P-replete-ish (SRP down to 7). Volumetric only.
